creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Created attachment 202818
Patch against /usr/ports

I have released a new version. Passes on

poudriere testport -j 112-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php71
poudriere testport -j 112-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php72
poudriere testport -j 112-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php73
poudriere testport -j 112-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php71
poudriere testport -j 112-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php72
poudriere testport -j 112-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php73
poudriere testport -j 120-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php71
poudriere testport -j 120-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php72
poudriere testport -j 120-release-amd64  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php73
poudriere testport -j 120-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php71
poudriere testport -j 120-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php72
poudriere testport -j 120-release-i386  -p dev -o devel/websvn@php73
